summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is explicitly not a dedupe cluster. Open hydrated PRs are kept for normal maintainer proof/review; #93212 is quarantined with route_security per validator security-sensitive classification; already-closed and unavailable refs are non-mutating outcomes only.
